sanskrit:
मन्मना भव मद्भक्तो मद्याजी मां नमस्कुरु।
मामेवैष्यसि सत्यं ते प्रतिजाने प्रियोऽसि मे॥
transliteration:
man-manā bhava mad-bhakto mad-yājī māṃ namaskuru |
mām evaiṣyasi satyaṃ te pratijāne priyo 'si me ||
literal_meaning: Think of Me, be My devotee, sacrifice to Me, bow to Me; thus you will certainly reach Me—I promise, for you are dear to Me.
contextual_meaning: Total cognitive-emotional fusion with the sacred archetype (Kṛṣṇa) is offered as the final defense against existential dread; the Self guarantees ego-safe passage if ego surrenders exclusive identification with persona.
psychological_state: Earned secure attachment: after working through moral fatigue and role confusion, the ego now risks full merger with the transpersonal Self, receiving a binding existential safety contract.
trigger_scenario: A burned-out caregiver, who has tried every self-care hack, finally allows themselves to mentally rest in an image of unconditional compassion—like picturing a loving grandparent or spiritual figure—during the 3 a.m. infant feeding.
anchor_text: Love the sacred completely and you are already home.
